title: C6 Active Authority V1 Ratification Packet (candidate-only, mechanical consumption envelope)
description: Machine-consumable ratification packet derived from the live V1 active-authority candidate. It mechanically binds the authority candidate digest, the four_layer_thresholds, and the decision/receipt refs. It is CANDIDATE_PACKET_ONLY: observed_status=CANDIDATE, target_status=RATIFIED, requires_operator_ceremony=true, is_v1_done=false. It does NOT forge operator/time/signature, does NOT elevate V1 to RATIFIED/canonical. The authoritative fail-closed invariants live in the exporter + test_check_c6_active_authority_ratification_packet.py. README prose is not a substitute for the schema or the checker.

schema_version.description: Packet envelope schema version. Bump on contract change.

packet_id.description: Stable packet identity for the V1 ratification packet (v1).

package_id.description: Closure-registry package id bound to this packet.

status.description: Packet is mechanical-consumption-only; does NOT elevate V1 to RATIFIED/canonical.

observed_status.description: Live authority candidate status (observed, not elevated).

target_status.description: Intended status after the operator ceremony (not yet achieved by this packet).

is_canonical.description: Always false on a candidate packet.

is_v1_done.description: V1 CANDIDATE->RATIFIED operator ceremony/canonical receipt is NOT produced by this packet.

requires_operator_ceremony.description: V1 canonical receipt requires an operator ceremony performed by another agent; this packet is not it.

digest_sha256.description: Self-digest of the live authority candidate (recomputed live). All-zero sentinel rejected.

decision_refs.description: D-147 (and supporting D-144) decision refs bound mechanically; cannot forge T01/T02 ratification string.

receipt_refs.description: Ratification receipt refs (D-147 decisions + pool32 receipt) bound mechanically.

source_members_binding.description: Packet-level exact binding of authority candidate source_members against live tracked files. Independent of the legacy authority digest (which deliberately excludes source_members).

digest_sha256.description: SHA256 over the canonical exact ordered source_members binding block. All-zero sentinel rejected.

members.description: Exact ordered member block (member_id/role/path/locator/sha256) matching live files.

non_claims.description: Explicit non-claims: not canonical, not RATIFIED, not V1 DONE, not C6 acceptance, not operator ceremony, not candidate signed, no forged operator/time/signature.
